actions.name: Remove Consumer Bloat Apps
actions.description: Remove pre-installed consumer apps: BingNews, BingWeather, Solitaire, People, Maps, FeedbackHub, GetHelp, Getstarted, Todos, Cortana, MixedReality, Skype

actions.name: Remove Cortana App
actions.description: Remove the Cortana UWP application

actions.name: Remove Get Office Hub
actions.description: Remove the 'Get Office' promotional app that advertises Office 365

actions.name: Remove Your Phone / Phone Link
actions.description: Remove the Your Phone / Phone Link companion app

actions.name: Remove Mail and Calendar
actions.description: Remove the built-in Mail and Calendar app (microsoft.windowscommunicationsapps)

actions.name: Remove Windows Camera
actions.description: Remove the built-in Windows Camera app (Microsoft.WindowsCamera)

actions.name: Remove Alarms & Clock
actions.description: Remove the built-in Alarms & Clock app (Microsoft.WindowsAlarms)

actions.name: Remove Sound Recorder
actions.description: Remove the built-in Sound Recorder app (Microsoft.WindowsSoundRecorder)

actions.name: Remove Sticky Notes
actions.description: Remove the built-in Sticky Notes app (Microsoft.MicrosoftStickyNotes)

actions.name: Remove Feedback Hub
actions.description: Remove the Feedback Hub app (Microsoft.WindowsFeedbackHub)

actions.name: Remove Windows Maps
actions.description: Remove the built-in Windows Maps app (Microsoft.WindowsMaps)

actions.name: Remove Get Help
actions.description: Remove the Get Help app (Microsoft.GetHelp)

actions.name: Remove Power Automate
actions.description: Remove the Power Automate Desktop app (Microsoft.PowerAutomateDesktop)

actions.name: Remove Solitaire
actions.description: Remove the Solitaire Collection app (Microsoft.MicrosoftSolitaireCollection)

actions.name: Remove Widgets
actions.description: Remove Windows Widgets (WebExperience) and disable via registry

actions.name: Remove Xbox Apps
actions.description: Remove Xbox companion apps (XboxApp, GamingOverlay, Xbox.TCUI, XboxGameCallableUI, XboxSpeechToTextOverlay)

actions.name: Remove Social Media Apps
actions.description: Remove preinstalled Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter, LinkedIn, Flipboard

actions.name: Remove Streaming App Trials
actions.description: Remove preinstalled Spotify, Hulu, Disney+, Amazon Prime Video, Netflix, iHeartRadio

actions.name: Remove Preinstalled Games
actions.description: Remove King games (Candy Crush, Farm Heroes, Bubble Witch), Disney Magic Kingdoms, Asphalt, Hidden City, FarmVille, Caesars Slots

actions.name: Remove OEM Utility Bloat
actions.description: Remove preinstalled third-party utilities: Adobe Express, Duolingo, Fitbit, Drawboard PDF, CyberLink, Autodesk SketchBook

actions.name: Remove Amazon & Shopping Apps
actions.description: Remove preinstalled Amazon app and shopping-related bloatware

actions.name: Remove Extended Microsoft Bloat
actions.description: Remove additional Microsoft apps: Clipchamp, Journal, PC Manager, Teams (old+new), DevHome, Quick Assist, News, OneNote, Sway, OneConnect, 3DBuilder, NetworkSpeedTest, PowerBI, ZuneVideo, Family Safety

actions.name: Remove Copilot App
actions.description: Remove the Microsoft Copilot AppX package and AI Hub

actions.name: Disable Edge Auto-Updates
actions.description: Prevent Edge from auto-updating and reinstalling itself via the Microsoft Edge Update service. Registry policy only — does not remove Edge.

actions.name: Disable Edge Preloading & Background
actions.description: Prevent Edge from preloading at startup, running startup boost, and staying resident in background when closed. Registry policy only.

actions.name: Disable Edge Default Browser Prompts
actions.description: Stop Edge from prompting users to set it as the default browser and showing first-run experience screens.

actions.name: Remove Microsoft Edge
actions.description: Permanently uninstall Microsoft Edge using the setup.exe force-uninstall flag and remove AppX provisioning to prevent reinstallation. This action cannot be undone — Edge must be reinstalled from microsoft.com if needed.
actions.warningMessage: This permanently removes Microsoft Edge. It cannot be undone from within Windows — you must download Edge from microsoft.com to reinstall. Some Windows features that open web links via Edge (Help, Feedback, some Settings pages) will fail to open. Ensure you have an alternative browser installed before proceeding.

actions.name: Remove Edge WebView2 Runtime
actions.description: Remove the Microsoft Edge WebView2 runtime. This is a shared system component used by many modern desktop applications for rendering web content inside their UI. Removing it WILL break applications that depend on it.
actions.warningMessage: WebView2 is a shared system component. Removing it WILL break: Microsoft Teams, Windows Widgets, some installer UIs, some Electron apps, and any app using embedded web views. This cannot be undone — you must manually download and reinstall WebView2 from developer.microsoft.com. Do NOT remove this unless you are certain no app on your system depends on it.

actions.name: Disable SysMain (Superfetch)
actions.description: Disable the SysMain service (formerly Superfetch) which preloads frequently used applications into memory

actions.name: Disable Sleep Study
actions.description: Disable the SleepStudy service that logs energy usage data during sleep/standby

actions.name: Disable Print Spooler
actions.description: Disable the Print Spooler service which manages print queues. Safe to disable on gaming systems with no printers.

actions.name: Disable Remote Access Services
actions.description: Disable Remote Desktop, Remote Registry, and Remote Assistance services that allow external connections to this PC

actions.name: Disable Xbox Background Services
actions.description: Disable Xbox Live Auth Manager, Xbox Live Game Save, and Xbox Accessory Management services

actions.name: Disable Telemetry Tasks
actions.description: Disable Application Experience and Customer Experience Improvement Program scheduled tasks

actions.name: Disable OneDrive Sync Tasks
actions.description: Disable OneDrive automatic sync scheduled tasks (blocked on work_pc profile)

actions.name: Disable Update Orchestrator Tasks
actions.description: Disable Windows Update Orchestrator scheduled tasks to reduce background update activity

actions.name: Set Diagnostic Data to Minimum
actions.description: Set Windows diagnostic data collection to Security level (minimum)

actions.name: Disable Customer Experience Program
actions.description: Opt out of Microsoft Customer Experience Improvement Program

actions.name: Disable Windows Error Reporting
actions.description: Disable automatic error report submission to Microsoft

actions.name: Disable Advertising ID
actions.description: Reset and disable the Windows advertising identifier

actions.name: Disable App Launch Tracking
actions.description: Stop tracking which apps you open for Start menu personalization

actions.name: Disable Tailored Experiences
actions.description: Stop Microsoft from using diagnostic data for personalized tips and ads

actions.name: Disable Online Tips
actions.description: Disable online tips and help content from Microsoft

actions.name: Disable Clipboard History & Cloud Sync
actions.description: Disable Windows clipboard history and cross-device clipboard synchronization

actions.name: Disable Activity History & Timeline
actions.description: Disable Windows activity feed, timeline, and activity data uploads to Microsoft

actions.name: Disable Cloud Content & Suggestions
actions.description: Disable Windows Spotlight, suggested apps, tips, and cloud-delivered content

actions.name: Disable Location Services
actions.description: Disable Windows location services to prevent location tracking

actions.name: Disable Input Personalization
actions.description: Disable implicit text and ink collection used for input personalization

actions.name: Disable Device Install Monitoring
actions.description: Disable system restore points for device installations via policy

actions.name: Block Removed Apps from Reinstalling
actions.description: Block previously removed AppX packages from being reinstalled by Windows Update by creating the Deprovisioned registry key

actions.name: Disable Online Speech Recognition
actions.description: Opt out of online speech recognition data collection

actions.name: Disable Touch Input Collection
actions.description: Disable touch keyboard and handwriting data collection

actions.name: Disable Contact Harvesting
actions.description: Prevent trained data store from harvesting contacts for input prediction

actions.name: Disable Feedback Frequency
actions.description: Set Windows feedback solicitation frequency to never

actions.name: Disable Find My Device
actions.description: Disable the Find My Device location tracking feature

actions.name: Disable SmartScreen Filter
actions.description: Disable the Windows SmartScreen filter that checks downloaded files and visited websites against Microsoft's reputation database

actions.name: Disable Windows Recall
actions.description: Disable the Windows Recall AI feature that captures screen activity

actions.name: Disable Click to Do
actions.description: Disable the AI-powered Click to Do overlay feature

actions.name: Prevent AI Service Auto Start
actions.description: Set Windows AI Fabric service to manual startup instead of automatic

actions.name: Disable Edge AI Features
actions.description: Disable Copilot integration, AI sidebar, and AI-powered features in Microsoft Edge

actions.name: Disable Paint AI Features
actions.description: Disable AI-powered Cocreator, Image Creator, and Generative tools in Paint

actions.name: Disable Notepad AI Features
actions.description: Disable AI-powered text generation and rewriting in Notepad

actions.name: Disable Smart App Control
actions.description: Disable cloud-based app reputation checking

actions.name: Set MMCSS System Responsiveness
actions.description: Allocate more CPU to multimedia/gaming tasks (10% reserved for background)

actions.name: Disable Service Host Splitting
actions.description: Group services into fewer svchost processes to reduce memory overhead

actions.name: Disable Paging Executive
actions.description: Keep kernel-mode drivers and system code in RAM

actions.name: Disable Fault Tolerant Heap
actions.description: Prevent Windows from auto-applying crash mitigations to applications that crash repeatedly

actions.name: Disable Sticky Keys Shortcut
actions.description: Disable the Shift×5 sticky keys shortcut that interrupts gameplay

actions.name: Exclude Driver Updates from Windows Update
actions.description: Prevent Windows Update from automatically installing driver updates

actions.name: Optimize Thread Priority
actions.description: Set Win32PrioritySeparation for foreground-biased scheduling

actions.name: Disable Memory Compression
actions.description: Disable the Windows memory compression agent that compresses in-memory pages to fit more data in RAM, trading CPU cycles for capacity

actions.name: Disable GPU Energy Driver
actions.description: Disable the GpuEnergyDrv driver that monitors GPU energy usage and causes DPC latency spikes

actions.name: Disable Hardware-Accelerated GPU Scheduling (HAGS)
actions.description: Disable HAGS by setting HwSchMode to 1. HAGS moves GPU scheduling from the CPU to the GPU itself, but can hurt frame time consistency on many systems.

actions.name: Lock NVIDIA GPU to P-State 0 (Maximum Performance)
actions.description: Disable dynamic P-State switching on NVIDIA GPUs by setting DisableDynamicPstate=1, forcing the GPU to remain at maximum clocks at all times

actions.name: Increase TDR Timeout to 10 Seconds
actions.description: Increase the Timeout Detection and Recovery (TDR) delay from the default 2 seconds to 10 seconds, preventing false GPU resets during heavy load spikes

actions.name: Enable GPU MSI (Message Signaled Interrupts) Mode
actions.description: Enable Message Signaled Interrupts for the GPU, replacing legacy line-based interrupts with in-band PCIe messages for lower interrupt latency

actions.name: Disable Nvidia Telemetry Services
actions.description: Disable the NvTelemetryContainer service that collects and transmits Nvidia driver usage data

actions.name: Disable AMD Telemetry
actions.description: Disable the AMD External Events Utility service that collects AMD driver telemetry data

actions.name: Disable Game DVR
actions.description: Disable Game DVR background recording to reduce GPU/CPU overhead during gaming

actions.name: Disable Fullscreen Optimizations Globally
actions.description: Disable fullscreen optimizations globally by setting FSE behavior mode, preventing Windows from using borderless windowed mode for fullscreen applications

actions.name: Disable Window Transparency Effects
actions.description: Disable window transparency effects (acrylic, blur) that use GPU compositing for translucent title bars and taskbar

actions.name: Disable Nvidia Container Services
actions.description: Disable NVDisplay.ContainerLocalSystem and NvContainerLocalSystem background services that run telemetry, overlay, and update checks.
actions.warningMessage: GeForce Experience overlay (Alt+Z), ShadowPlay recording, and automatic driver updates will stop working. Manual driver updates via nvidia.com will still work.

actions.name: Disable AMD Background Services
actions.description: Disable AMD Crash Defender, External Events Utility, and AUEPLauncher services that run crash monitoring, event processing, and update checks.
actions.warningMessage: AMD Adrenalin overlay, crash reporting, and automatic driver updates will stop working. Manual driver updates via amd.com will still work.

actions.name: Disable Dynamic Tick and Enable Platform Timer
actions.description: Disable the Windows dynamic tick mechanism via BCD, forcing a fixed timer interrupt interval. Enable the platform hardware timer (HPET/TSC) as the tick source to provide the lowest possible timer jitter.

actions.name: Enable Global Timer Resolution Requests
actions.description: Set the GlobalTimerResolutionRequests registry key to restore system-wide timer resolution behavior on Windows 11+

actions.name: Disable CPU Core Parking
actions.description: Set minimum processor cores to 100% on AC power, preventing Windows from parking cores during low load. Parked cores introduce 1-5 ms wake latency.

actions.name: Aggressive Processor Boost Mode
actions.description: Set processor performance boost policy to Aggressive (mode 2). This prioritizes sustained maximum turbo frequency over power efficiency.

actions.name: Set Minimum Processor State to 100%
actions.description: Prevent the CPU from throttling below maximum frequency. Sets both minimum and maximum processor state to 100%.

actions.name: MMCSS Gaming Profile - Maximum Priority
actions.description: Configure the Multimedia Class Scheduler Service (MMCSS) Games task profile with maximum GPU priority (8), elevated CPU scheduling priority (6), High scheduling category, and a 1 ms clock rate

actions.name: Activate High Performance Power Plan
actions.description: Set the active power plan to Windows High Performance, preventing CPU frequency scaling and sleep transitions

actions.name: Disable Fast Startup (Hybrid Shutdown)
actions.description: Disable Windows Fast Startup (hybrid shutdown) which hibernates the kernel session instead of performing a full shutdown

actions.name: Disable Hibernation
actions.description: Disable Windows hibernation, which removes the hibernation file (hiberfil.sys) and frees disk space equal to approximately 75% of installed RAM

actions.name: Disable USB Selective Suspend
actions.description: Disable USB selective suspend for both AC and DC power, preventing Windows from powering down USB devices during idle periods

actions.name: Disable PCIe Link State Power Management
actions.description: Disable Active State Power Management (ASPM) transitions on PCIe devices, preventing the system from placing the PCIe bus in low-power link states (L0s, L1)

actions.name: Disable Modern Standby
actions.description: Disable Modern Standby (S0 Low Power Idle) to force legacy S3 sleep. Prevents network activity, background updates, and battery drain during sleep.
actions.warningMessage: Changes sleep behavior from Modern Standby to legacy S3. Instant wake and background sync will no longer work. Verify sleep works correctly after reboot.

actions.name: Disable NTFS Last Access Timestamp
actions.description: Disable updating the last access timestamp on files and directories, reducing write I/O for every file read operation

actions.name: Disable 8.3 Short Filename Creation
actions.description: Disable creation of legacy 8.3-character (DOS-compatible) short filenames on NTFS volumes, reducing directory enumeration overhead

actions.name: Enable Disk Write Caching
actions.description: Enable write caching on storage devices, allowing the OS to buffer writes in RAM before flushing to disk for improved I/O throughput

actions.name: Disable Windows Search Indexing Service
actions.description: Disable the Windows Search indexing service (WSearch) which continuously scans and indexes file contents in the background

actions.name: Hide Task View Button
actions.description: Remove the Task View button from the taskbar

actions.name: Hide Widgets Button
actions.description: Remove the Widgets button from the taskbar

actions.name: Reduce Search Box
actions.description: Reduce the taskbar search box to an icon

actions.name: Disable Windows Copilot
actions.description: Disable the Copilot AI sidebar and remove the taskbar button

actions.name: Hide Teams Chat Icon
actions.description: Remove the Teams Chat icon from the taskbar

actions.name: Enable End Task in Taskbar
actions.description: Show End Task option when right-clicking apps on the taskbar

actions.name: Hide Meet Now
actions.description: Hide the Meet Now / Chat icon from the system tray

actions.name: Restore Classic Context Menu
actions.description: Restore the full classic right-click context menu on Windows 11

actions.name: Disable Search Highlights
actions.description: Remove trending and promotional content from Windows Search

actions.name: Disable Search History
actions.description: Disable device search history used for search suggestions

actions.name: Show File Extensions
actions.description: Show file extensions in File Explorer for all file types

actions.name: Show Hidden Files
actions.description: Display hidden files and folders in File Explorer

actions.name: Open Explorer to This PC
actions.description: Set File Explorer to open to This PC instead of Home/Quick Access

actions.name: Disable Web Search in Start
actions.description: Remove Bing web results from Windows Search

actions.name: Disable Lock Screen Tips
actions.description: Remove tips and ads from the Windows lock screen

actions.name: Disable Start Menu Suggestions
actions.description: Remove app suggestions and recommendations from the Start menu

actions.name: Disable Content Delivery Subscriptions
actions.description: Remove all Windows content delivery ads — welcome experience, tips, suggested content

actions.name: Disable Account Notifications
actions.description: Remove Microsoft account and setup nag notifications

actions.name: Disable Suggested & Backup Notifications
actions.description: Remove Windows toast notifications for suggestions and backup reminders

actions.name: Disable Sync Provider Notifications
actions.description: Remove OneDrive and sync provider ads from File Explorer

actions.name: Disable Phone Link Suggestions
actions.description: Remove Phone Link opt-in prompts and mobility suggestions

actions.name: Disable Desktop Spotlight
actions.description: Remove the Learn about this picture desktop spotlight overlay

actions.name: Disable Edge Ads & Suggestions
actions.description: Remove ads, shopping, recommendations, and promotional content from Microsoft Edge

actions.name: Disable Settings Ads
actions.description: Remove Microsoft 365 and promotional content from Windows Settings

actions.name: Disable Background Apps
actions.description: Prevent UWP apps from running in the background to reduce resource usage

actions.name: Disable Cortana Startup
actions.description: Prevent Cortana from launching at Windows startup

actions.name: Disable Automatic Maintenance
actions.description: Disable Windows Automatic Maintenance which runs scheduled tasks including disk defragmentation, Windows Update checks, and security scans during idle periods

actions.name: Disable GameBarPresenceWriter
actions.description: Disable the GameBarPresenceWriter background process that runs alongside every game, even when Game Bar overlay is not used

actions.name: Disable AutoPlay & AutoRun
actions.description: Disable automatic media playback and program execution when inserting removable drives

actions.name: Enable Game Mode
actions.description: Enable Windows Game Mode to prioritize game processes and reduce background interference

actions.name: Disable Cloud Notification Network Usage
actions.description: Block Windows Push Notification System from making network calls to Microsoft cloud servers for notification delivery

actions.name: Decrease Shutdown Time
actions.description: Reduce app kill timeouts for faster shutdown

actions.name: Force End Applications
actions.description: Reduce WaitToKillServiceTimeout for faster service shutdown

actions.name: Disable Game Bar and Game DVR
actions.description: Disable the Xbox Game Bar overlay and Game DVR background recording, removing the capture pipeline from the display path

actions.name: Disable Mouse Pointer Acceleration
actions.description: Disable Windows pointer acceleration (Enhance Pointer Precision) by setting MouseSpeed, MouseThreshold1, and MouseThreshold2 to 0

actions.name: Disable Audio Enhancements
actions.description: Disable Windows audio enhancements (spatial audio, equalizer, virtual surround, loudness equalization) to reduce audio processing overhead and DPC latency

actions.name: Configure WASAPI Exclusive Mode Priority
actions.description: Ensure WASAPI exclusive mode is enabled for audio endpoints, allowing games and applications to bypass the Windows audio mixer for direct hardware access with lowest latency

actions.name: Disable IPv6 Protocol Stack
actions.description: Disable the IPv6 protocol stack by setting DisabledComponents to 0xFF, preventing all IPv6 components from loading

actions.name: Disable Teredo Tunneling
actions.description: Disable Teredo IPv6 tunneling which encapsulates IPv6 packets within IPv4 UDP datagrams, adding latency overhead

actions.name: Disable NetBIOS over TCP/IP
actions.description: Disable NetBIOS over TCP/IP by setting NodeType to P-node (2) and NetbiosOptions to disabled (2), preventing NetBIOS name resolution and session services

actions.name: Disable Nagle's Algorithm (TCPNoDelay)
actions.description: Disable Nagle's algorithm and set TCP acknowledgement frequency to 1, sending small packets immediately instead of buffering them

actions.name: Set RSS Queues to 2
actions.description: Configure Receive Side Scaling to use 2 RSS queues, distributing NIC interrupt processing across 2 CPU cores without over-allocating

actions.name: Disable NIC Offloading
actions.description: Disable TCP/UDP checksum offload, Large Send Offload, flow control, and power-saving features on the active NIC. Reduces packet processing latency at the cost of higher CPU usage.
actions.warningMessage: Increases CPU usage during network activity. May cause connectivity issues on some NICs. Benchmark before and after. Revert immediately if you lose network connectivity.

actions.name: Set TCP Auto-Tuning to Normal
actions.description: Set TCP receive window auto-tuning level to normal for optimal throughput negotiation

actions.name: Disable Link-Local Multicast Name Resolution
actions.description: Disable LLMNR by setting EnableMulticast to 0, preventing the system from responding to or sending LLMNR queries

actions.name: Reduce Speculative Store Bypass (SSBD) Mitigation
actions.description: Disable the SSBD mitigation via FeatureSettingsOverride registry keys. This reduces a 2-8% performance overhead on syscall-heavy workloads but exposes the system to CVE-2018-3639.

actions.name: Disable Hypervisor-enforced Code Integrity
actions.description: Disable HVCI (Hypervisor-enforced Code Integrity) which validates kernel-mode code integrity using the hypervisor, adding overhead to every driver load and some system calls

actions.name: Disable Windows Update (EXTREME RISK)
actions.description: Completely disable the Windows Update service and all related update mechanisms. This stops ALL updates including security patches.

actions.name: Disable Early Access Updates
actions.description: Prevent Windows from opting in to early access / continuous innovation updates

actions.name: Disable Delivery Optimization
actions.description: Disable peer-to-peer Windows Update delivery that uses your bandwidth for other PCs

actions.name: Disable BitLocker Auto-Encryption
actions.description: Prevent Windows from automatically enabling BitLocker device encryption

actions.name: Prevent Windows Update Auto-Restart
actions.description: Prevent Windows Update from automatically restarting the PC when a user is logged on by setting NoAutoRebootWithLoggedOnUsers to 1

actions.name: Defer Feature Updates by 365 Days
actions.description: Defer Windows feature updates by 365 days, allowing only security and quality updates to install while postponing major version upgrades
